results.title: Real Madrid signs Denzel Dumfries from Inter Milan to boost defense
results.description: MADRID (AP) — Real Madrid boosted its defense by signing Dutch international Denzel Dumfries from Inter Milan.

results.title: Cabo Verde Say Goodbye to World Cup As the Champions of Hearts
results.description: "I can only thank our team for their effort and for showing so much heart on that pitch, and I think everyone should thank them for what they did for this tournament" Cape Verde head coach Bubista said
